title: Merge 'master' into 'develop-v5'
body:
Updates `develop-v5` with the latest changes from `master`.

There are two additional commits here:

* one should fix https://github.com/verilator/verilator/issues/3442
  (though the undefined behavior is still there)
* the other fixes a problem where GCC 10 issues a warning for lines like this:
     https://github.com/verilator/verilator/blob/f0a2c983767835ce74e042f08a60c7982951bcd1/include/verilated_types.h#L98
    ```
    verilated_types.h:98:30: error: comparison of unsigned expression in ‘< 0’ is always false [-Werror=type-limits]
       98 |         for (size_t i = 0; i < T_size; ++i)
          |                            ~~^~~~~~~~
    ```
    (when the trigger vector is empty, so when `T_size` is 0, the comparison is `i < 0` which is always `false` for `size_t`)
    See this CI run:
    https://github.com/antmicro/verilator-1/actions/runs/2370749796

Signed-off-by: Krzysztof Bieganski <kbieganski@antmicro.com>

verilated_types.h:98:30: error: comparison of unsigned expression in ‘< 0’ is always false [-Werror=type-limits]
       98 |         for (size_t i = 0; i < T_size; ++i)
          |                            ~~^~~~~~~~
